purpose: Explicit homepage primary-counter visibility classification. This sidecar does not mutate append-only record files; it classifies immutable record_id + record_sha256 pairs for homepage rendering only.

default_for_unlisted_records.reason: Records without explicit homepage visibility classification are audit/technical records only.

homepage_visibility.reason: First production-live founding Guardian application record classified for homepage primary reception display. The classification is explicit and does not make record-chain length a homepage reception counter.
